creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Currently running a full ports tree build with DEFAULT_VERSIONS=php=71 and I see many PECL ports failing. Errors are similar for many of these, I think there's 3 errors:

> error: unknown type name 'zend_object_value'

and

> error: too many arguments to function call, expected 3, have 5

and

> fatal error: 'ext/standard/php_smart_str.h' file not found
